about.title: About Dr. Sarah Johnson
about.description: With a passion for preventive medicine and patient wellness, Dr. Johnson combines traditional medical expertise with modern treatment approaches. Her compassionate care and attention to detail have earned her recognition as one of the region's most trusted physicians.
highlights: Board-certified internist and family medicine specialist
Specializes in preventive care and chronic disease management
Active member of the American Medical Association

reviews.name: John Martinez
reviews.text: Dr. Johnson is absolutely wonderful. She takes time to listen and always explains things clearly. I feel truly cared for.

reviews.name: Emily Chen
reviews.text: Best doctor I've ever had. Professional, kind, and genuinely interested in my health. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: David Thompson
reviews.text: Exceptional care. Dr. Johnson helped me manage my diabetes better than any doctor I've seen before.

reviews.name: Lisa Anderson
reviews.text: Very thorough and attentive. The entire experience from scheduling to appointment was smooth and professional.

reviews.name: Michael Ross
reviews.text: Dr. Johnson's bedside manner is impeccable. She makes you feel like your health is her top priority.

faq.question: Do I need insurance to schedule an appointment?
faq.answer: We accept most major insurance plans. If you're uninsured, we offer flexible payment plans and sliding scale fees. Please call to discuss your specific situation.

faq.question: What should I bring to my first appointment?
faq.answer: Please bring a valid ID, insurance card, and any medical records from previous providers. Complete our new patient form online to save time.

faq.question: How long are typical appointments?
faq.answer: Initial consultations are 45 minutes. Follow-up visits are typically 30 minutes. This ensures Dr. Johnson has adequate time for your care.

faq.question: Can I schedule appointments online?
faq.answer: Yes, you can book appointments through our website. For urgent matters, call us directly at (555) 123-4567.

faq.question: Do you offer telemedicine appointments?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer secure video consultations for established patients. This is perfect for follow-ups and minor concerns.
